## CONTENT_BLOCK


### Summary
Residents of Harare aged 65 years or older receive a 15% discount on their monthly water consumption charges.

### Policy Statement
All registered water account holders who are 65 years or older are eligible for a 15% discount on the consumption portion of their monthly water bill. The discount does not apply to fixed service fees, sewerage charges, or penalties.

### Who It Applies To
- Individuals aged 65 or above at the time of application.
- The applicant must be the named account holder on the water bill.
- Only one discount per household, even if multiple seniors reside there.
- The property must be residential (not commercial or industrial).

### Exceptions
- Commercial properties are not eligible.
- If the account holder is a trust, company, or deceased estate, the discount does not apply.
- Tenants (even if senior) cannot receive the discount unless they are the registered account holder.

### Application Process
Applicants must submit:
1. Completed senior discount application form (available at customer service centres or online).
2. Certified copy of National ID (showing date of birth).
3. A recent water bill.

Submit to any customer service centre or zonal office. The discount will be applied from the next billing cycle after approval.

### Common Questions Answered
- Q: How long does the discount last?
  A: The discount is ongoing but must be re‑verified every two years by submitting a new application.
- Q: I am 65 but the bill is in my spouse’s name (who is 60). Can we get the discount?
  A: No, the discount applies only to the named account holder. You would need to transfer the account to your name first.
- Q: Will I get a refund for previous months?
  A: No, the discount is not retroactive. It starts from the billing cycle after approval.
